export_result.sh evaluates 1.0 <= avg <= 10.0. R script execution confirms actual ED50 values are around 3.0
export_result.sh verifies that Glyphosate ED50 > Bentazone ED50 (and Bentazone > 0), which enforces SI > 1.0
The task instructions explicitly require four models: LL.4, W1.4, W2.4, BC.4. The verifier checks for count >= 3.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on the "ryegrass" and "S.alba" real-world datasets from the R "drc" package (from Inderjit et al. 2002 and Christensen et al. 2003, respectively). R execution confirms the Ryegrass models produce ED50 values of ~3.0; export_result.sh validates an average ED50 in the range of [1.0, 10.0], contradicting the metadata"s narrower [1.5, 6.0] range claim. The task instructions mandate fitting four specific models for Ryegrass (LL.4, W1.4, W2.4, BC.4), contradicting the metadata"s list of only three. For the S.alba dataset, Glyphosate"s ED50 (~62.1) is greater than Bentazone"s ED50 (~29.3), conforming to the expected Selectivity Index > 1.0 enforced in the verifier. All required output file paths are explicitly validated by export_result.sh.
